title: Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Shulker Box Tooltip mod
description: This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Shulker Box Tooltip mod.
body:
# Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Shulker Box Tooltip mod
This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Shulker Box Tooltip mod.If you want the same style for the vanilla GUI, download [Mechanical Equation GUI pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mechanical-equation-gui-pack).
## Config requirements
- For the most perfect results, please turn off the Colored Preview Window in the mod config.

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

**_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
